null_calibrated_brb.description: Minimum half-width from residual-pool null calibration

restricted_worlds_only_brb.reason: evaluation filter only; not a production policy

root_cause_analysis.question: Is undercoverage caused by bootstrap replicate variance being too small?
root_cause_analysis.finding: Partially on mean-effect scale: calibration_ratio_mean_effect often < 1 (baseline mean 0.8820238084299761); cumulative variance_ratio is inflated by scale mismatch.

root_cause_analysis.question: Is null type-I high because intervals are too narrow?
root_cause_analysis.finding: Partially: type-I 0.5 with null coverage 0.5; null_calibrated widening helps marginally but does not reach gates.

root_cause_analysis.question: Is the interval centered correctly after the prior correction?
Does ridge shrinkage bias interact with bootstrap variance?
root_cause_analysis.finding: Yes: null worlds show material point bias (mean bias 2.679097659155361); conditional BRB cannot correct estimator bias.

root_cause_analysis.question: Does BRB condition on fitted ridge coefficients correctly?
root_cause_analysis.finding: Conditional resampling (no refit) ignores coefficient-estimation uncertainty.

limitations: Conditional BRB does not refit ridge coefficients; point bias under null remains.
Cumulative variance_ratio diagnostic mixes sum-scale bootstrap with per-period empirical SE.
Remediation policies widen or recalibrate mean-effect intervals only.
Does not authorize TrustReport; post-remediation reassessment required if candidate.
